args.Description: "routesオブジェクトに「world-map」を追加しました。"
args.Instruction: "Add the 'world-map' route mapping to the routes object."
args.ReplacementContent:
"// --- ROUTER CONFIG ---
const routes = {
  home: renderHome,
  dictionary: renderDictionary,
  'dictionary/:id': renderDetail,
  'topics': renderTopics,
  'glossary': renderGlossary,
  'my-collection': renderMyCollection,
  'world-map': renderWorldMap
};"
args.TargetContent:
"// --- ROUTER CONFIG ---
const routes = {
  home: renderHome,
  dictionary: renderDictionary,
  'dictionary/:id': renderDetail,
  'topics': renderTopics,
  'glossary': renderGlossary,
  'my-collection': renderMyCollection
};"
